ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Emmental cheese, grated, from cow's milk

ingredients_text: Crêpe salée 60% (lait entier frais fermier, farine de blé 30%, oeufs entiers, sel < 1%), jambon supérieur 20% (jambon de porc, sel, dextrose, sirop de glucose, antioxydant : érythorbate de sodium, conservateur : nitrite de sodium, arôme), emmental râpé 20%.
